'''Reesa Doliq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the final decades of peace.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Reesa Doliq was educated in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]; Doliq had attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by [[89 BBY]]. Appointed as an [[Jedi academy|academy]] [[Jedi instructor|instructor]], Master Doliq was stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. At the Temple, a voluntary assignment was open to the Temple's senior [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] and younger [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]], which pitted two teams of ten against each other in a fun competition. In 89 BBY, Doliq was assigned to oversee the transport of a group designated as Blue Team, led by a young Padawan named [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], to the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District's]] [[All Planets Market]].<ref name="LOTJ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
